headline: A Look At International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) Valuation After Portfolio Sale And Sustainable Fragrance Expansion
summary: Why IFF’s recent moves matter for investors International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF) has been reshaping its business, completing the sale of soy crush, concentrates and lecithin operations to Bunge, while also pushing further into sustainable fragrance ingredients and capacity expansion in France. See our latest analysis for International Flavors & Fragrances. Those portfolio moves and the push into sustainable fragrance ingredients come as the share price sits at US$80.75, with a 30-day...
